message:
🐛 Fix GA4 error root causes: card_render and uncaught_render (#2569)

GA4 shows 384 ksc_error events in 28 days. Two code-level fixes:

- CardHistory: guard useCardHistory() result with || [] to prevent
  TypeError when hook returns undefined (4 uncaught_render on /history)
- OperatorStatus: replace dynamic Tailwind classes (bg-${color}-500/20)
  with static lookup maps — dynamic interpolation isn't compiled at
  build time (18 card_render errors on /operators)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
